tree.name: Steven Adams
tree.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Victor Oladipo, a 2024 2nd round pick (OKC own, Jaylen Wells #39), a 2024 2nd round pick (more favorable, Ulrich Chomche #57) and a 2025 2nd round pick (more favorable of HOU/OKC, Will Richard) to Memphis Grizzlies for Steven Adams
tree.note: New Zealand center acquired from Memphis Grizzlies

assetsGivenUp.name: Victor Oladipo
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Kevin Porter Jr., 2027 2nd (MIN own) and 2028 2nd (MIL own) to OKC for Oladipo and Jeremiah Robinson-Earl. Houston also received trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Salary dump to move off Kevin Porter Jr. after off-court issues

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Porter Jr.
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets sent a 2024 2nd round pick (GSW own, did not convey) to Cleveland for Kevin Porter Jr. Cleveland also received trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Guard acquired from Cleveland for a conditional 2nd round pick

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick via GSW
assetsGivenUp.note: Conditional pick; did not convey. Sent to CLE for KPJ.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 2nd Round Pick via MIN
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally MIN's pick, acquired by HOU in TyTy Washington trade (June 24, 2022); sent to OKC

assetsGivenUp.name: 2028 2nd Round Pick via MIL
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally MIL's pick, acquired by HOU in Patty Mills trade with BRK (July 6, 2023); sent to OKC

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick via BKN
assetsGivenUp.note: Did not convey. Sent to BKN for Mills and this pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#39, more favorable)
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally BRK's 2nd round pick; acquired by HOU from BKN for cash and Sekou Doumbouya (Oct 6, 2021). Sent to MEM who drafted Jaylen Wells.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to BKN for Doumbouya (waived) and this pick

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#57) via OKC
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally OKC's 2nd round pick; acquired by HOU from ATL in Bruno Fernando/Garrison Mathews trade (Feb 9, 2023). Sent to MEM who drafted Chomche.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bruno Fernando
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded Daniel Theis to Celtics for Bruno Fernando, Enes Freedom and Dennis Schroder
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from BOS in Theis trade; sent to ATL for picks

assetsGivenUp.name: Daniel Theis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Rockets traded cash to Chicago Bulls for Daniel Theis

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Cash sent to CHI for Theis

assetsGivenUp.name: Garrison Mathews
assetsGivenUp.note: Claimed on waivers from BOS; later signed to contract. Sent to ATL for picks.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (more favorable of HOU/OKC)
assetsGivenUp.note: Became HOU's own pick; sent to MEM who drafted Will Richard
